title: Description of the Atrium and Porticos.

source.title: NPNF2-01. Eusebius Pamphilius: Church History, Life of Constantine, Oration in Praise of Constantine

verses.text: The next object of his attention was a space of ground of great extent, and open to the pure air of heaven.
This he adorned with a pavement of finely polished stone, and enclosed it on three sides with porticos of great length.
